response.original_title: ((Add*New*Stateroom)) How Do I Add an Additional Room to My MSC Cruises Booking? 2026 Complete Guide
response.overview: To add a room (cabin) to an existing MSC cruise booking, you must call MSC Cruises directly at +1-855-[732] 4023 (US) or contact your travel agent, as adding cabins typically cannot be done online. Adding a cabin usually involves making a new +1-855-[732] 4023, separate reservation, which should then be linked to your original booking. BY Phone: Call MSC Cruise +1 (855) 732‑4023 (US) or +44 (289) 708-0062 (UK) | Office Timings (Mon-Fri, 9 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. GMT; Sat, 8 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. GMT). To add a room to a MSC cruise, contact their reservation team at +1-855-[732] 4023, or your travel agent to check availability. New rooms are booked as separate, new reservations and can be linked to your original booking for proximity +1-855-[732] 4023. Act early to ensure availability for adjacent or connecting suites. To add a room (stateroom) to an existing MSC Cruise reservation, you can call their customer service directly at +1-855-[732] 4023.
response.tagline: ((Add*New*Stateroom)) How Do I Add an Additional Room to My MSC Cruises Booking? 2026 Complete Guide
response.title: ((Add*New*Stateroom)) How Do I Add an Additional Room to My MSC Cruises Booking? 2026 Complete Guide
